label: V2 Kiosk Wi-Fi
info: Dashboard V2 Wi-Fi control. Publishes Besiter setWifi commands to /<stationid>/<moduleid>/user/get for every module with payload {"cmd":"setWifi","username":"<ssid>","password":"<password>"}.

name: V2 Wi-Fi from dashboard edit card
info: Listens to the authenticated dashboard V2 command link, resolves the kiosk/modules from Firestore, publishes the Besiter setWifi command, persists kiosk.wifi, and sends a dashboard toast. The dashboard API link out must include b7de2b389a6e9cb1.

name: Prepare V2 Wi-Fi lookup
Publish Besiter Wi-Fi
Response wires target the existing dashboard websocket response node
info: The dangling target id 590392fc03398acc is the same dashboard response path used by the V2 bulk/audio command imports. If your Node-RED workspace uses a different response node, wire the response outputs there.
